# Changelog

All notable changes to this project are documented here. The format follows
[Keep a Changelog](https://keepachangelog.com/), and the project aims to
adhere to [Semantic Versioning](https://semver.org/).

Entries are not edited here by hand. Each change adds a small file under
`changelog.d/`; at release time `scripts/assemble-changelog.mjs` rolls the
pending fragments into a new version section below the marker.

## Unreleased

<!-- New releases are inserted below by scripts/assemble-changelog.mjs; do not edit this file by hand. -->

## [1.0.0] - 2026-07-19

### Added

- Initial release: fast, offline pre-commit lints that catch CI honesty lies
  (exit codes masked by pipes, required checks that never report) and
  supply-chain identity lies (mutable image tags, unpinned downloads) before a
  green check can hide them, together with the changelog-fragment workflow and
  the tag/release automation that ship them.
